headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.supabase.co; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.supabase.co https://images.unsplash.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://*.vercel.app; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
